meta.decision_rationale: Competitive map identifies how the library differentiates from digital platforms and corporate community spaces. Critical for positioning collection and governance model.
evidence_refs: Competing bookstores and cafes in area
Other library governance models (3 case studies)
tradeoffs: May reveal uncomfortable truths about competitive disadvantage
Requires honest assessment of library's actual vs. perceived value
rejected_alternatives: Competing on features where we'll always lose (speed, convenience)

competitors.name: Amazon & Digital Commerce
competitors.positioning: On-demand, infinite selection, convenience, personalized algorithms
competitors.library_differentiation: Human curation, community values, local trust, serendipity

competitors.name: Coffee Shop & Bookstore
competitors.library_differentiation: Free access, comprehensive collection, community-driven collection, equity focus

competitors.name: Parks, Community Centers, Civic Spaces
competitors.library_differentiation: Knowledge + community integration, intellectual freedom, diverse perspectives
